title: centaurea spinosa
intro: Centaurea spinosa, also known as prickly thistle, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Centaurea spinosa include its ability to support liver health, boost the immune system, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Centaurea spinosa can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
